This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using top-line revenue labels as a priority list. 'Net turnover' is preferred as the primary sales label; 'Total Revenue' is a clear fallback and matches the same values in preview.

candidates.why: Direct production cost line and matches COGS values.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense label; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not the core current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists, so mapped XRD to that label only. Did not use amortization of capitalized R&D because it is not the same as current R&D expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable only if direct interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over core interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses direct interest expense first, with broader finance costs as fallback if labeling changes over time.

candidates.why: Component of assets/investments, not total book equity.

Total equity includes minority interest when present; less preferred than parent equity.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected parent/shareholder equity to avoid double counting minority interests in BE + MIB.
